texto: I believe that You Reap What You Sow. I believe that we don't meet people by accident
autor: everything happens for a reason. I believe that standing for what you believe in isn’t an easy thing but it’s the right thing to do
explicacao: Citação de everything happens for a reason. I believe that standing for what you believe in isn’t an easy thing but it’s the right thing to do sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I believe that You Reap What You Sow. I believe that we don't meet people by accident” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
